metadata.name: MCP Agent Setup Guide
metadata.purpose: Comprehensive onboarding and operational guide for AI agents (Claude, GitHub Copilot, etc.) working with the Ectropy platform, covering MCP integration, workflow patterns, quality gates, and enterprise development standards
metadata.author: AI Agent Framework Team

executiveSummary.description: Complete operational guide for AI agents developing on the Ectropy platform. Covers environment setup, MCP server integration, quality gates, testing requirements, documentation standards, and enterprise development workflows. Provides both simple feature workflows and comprehensive MCP-guided workflows for complex implementations.
keyChanges: Consolidated from multiple agent guides into single source
Added MCP Graph Query Layer (97% token reduction)
prerequisites: Read ARCHITECTURE.md (10 min) - Understand system structure
Read CURRENT_TRUTH.md (5 min) - Know current platform state
Read AI_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md (5 min) - Understand MCP workflow
Development environment (GitHub Codespaces, Claude Desktop, or local)

preFlightChecks.name: MCP Server Connectivity
preFlightChecks.description: Verify connection to MCP server (staging or local)

onFailure.message: Cannot connect to MCP server. Verify network connectivity and MCP_URL environment variable.

preFlightChecks.name: MCP API Key Validation
preFlightChecks.description: Verify MCP_API_KEY is set and valid
preFlightChecks.expectedResult: HTTP 200 with list of available MCP tools

onFailure.message: Invalid or missing MCP_API_KEY. Set MCP_API_KEY environment variable or GitHub secret.
Not in a git repository or no git access. Clone Ectropy repository first.
Node.js 18+ required. Update Node.js or use nvm/fnm.
pnpm required. Install with: npm install -g pnpm

preFlightChecks.name: Architecture Documentation Review
preFlightChecks.description: Verify ARCHITECTURE.md exists and has been read

onFailure.message: Read docs/ARCHITECTURE.md before starting work to understand system structure.

preFlightChecks.name: Current Truth Documentation Review
preFlightChecks.description: Verify CURRENT_TRUTH.md exists and is current

onFailure.message: Read docs/CURRENT_TRUTH.md to understand current platform state.

preFlightChecks.name: Docker Availability
preFlightChecks.description: Check if Docker is available (optional for some workflows)

onFailure.message: Docker not available. Some workflows require Docker for containerized testing.

phases.name: Initial Setup and Environment Understanding
phases.description: Configure MCP connection, understand environment capabilities, and review core documentation

steps.name: Set MCP Environment Variables
steps.description: Configure MCP_URL and MCP_API_KEY for server connection
steps.purpose: Enable MCP server connectivity for guidance and validation

onFailure.message: Cannot proceed without MCP server access

steps.name: Test MCP Connection
steps.description: Verify connection to MCP server health endpoint
steps.purpose: Validate network connectivity to MCP server

steps.name: Test MCP API Authentication
steps.description: Verify API key works with authenticated endpoint
steps.purpose: Validate API key authentication

steps.name: Review Architecture Documentation
steps.description: Read ARCHITECTURE.md to understand system structure
steps.purpose: Understand monorepo structure, service architecture, and file locations

steps.name: Review Current Platform State
steps.description: Read CURRENT_TRUTH.md to know recent changes
steps.purpose: Understand current platform state and recent modifications

steps.name: Review MCP Agent Protocol
steps.description: Read AI_AGENT_PROTOCOL.md to understand workflow
steps.purpose: Learn MCP-guided workflow and validation gates

steps.name: Identify Environment Capabilities
steps.description: Determine which tools are available (bash, git, docker, etc.)
steps.purpose: Understand environment-specific constraints and adapt workflow

phases.name: MCP Graph Query Layer Integration
phases.description: Learn to use MCP Graph Query endpoints for efficient platform intelligence

steps.name: Test GraphQL Endpoint
steps.description: Verify GraphQL query endpoint is accessible
steps.command: curl -X POST https://staging.ectropy.ai/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query": "{ __schema { types { name } } }"}'
steps.purpose: Validate GraphQL endpoint connectivity

steps.name: Query Platform Decisions
steps.description: Retrieve all platform decisions using Graph Query API
steps.purpose: Access decision intelligence without loading full DECISION_LOG.md (97% token reduction)

steps.name: Query Specific Decision with GraphQL
steps.description: Retrieve single decision with selected fields only
steps.command: curl -X POST https://staging.ectropy.ai/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query": "{ decisions { decisionId title status impact category } }"}'
steps.purpose: Demonstrate efficient field selection for minimal token usage

steps.name: Query Decision Dependencies
steps.description: Get decision relationship graph
steps.purpose: Understand decision relationships and impact analysis

steps.name: Query Evidence Files
steps.description: Retrieve evidence metadata for validation
steps.purpose: Access evidence files without filesystem traversal

onFailure.message: Evidence query failed but not critical

phases.name: Quality Gates and Validation Framework
phases.description: Understand 4-layer quality gate system: pre-commit, pre-merge, proactive monitoring, and dependency validation

steps.name: Review Pre-Commit Hook
steps.description: Understand local validation that runs before each commit
steps.purpose: Learn about pattern validation, security scanning, TypeScript checks, tests, and linting

steps.name: Review PR Validation Workflow
steps.description: Understand pre-merge validation for pull requests
steps.purpose: Learn about 4 parallel validation jobs: TypeScript, tests, lint, dependencies

steps.name: Test Local TypeScript Validation
steps.description: Run TypeScript type checking locally
steps.purpose: Verify TypeScript strict mode compliance before commit

steps.name: Test Local Test Suite
steps.description: Run affected tests with coverage
steps.purpose: Ensure 80% minimum coverage requirement met

steps.name: Run Dependency Compatibility Check
steps.description: Validate third-party library versions and features
steps.purpose: Prevent using features not available in current dependency versions

steps.name: Review Infrastructure Health Monitoring
steps.description: Understand proactive health checks for self-hosted runners
steps.purpose: Learn about automated infrastructure validation every 3 hours

onFailure.message: Runner health workflow file not found

phases.name: Documentation Standards and JSON-First Workflow
phases.description: Learn 12-file documentation policy and JSON-first documentation generation

steps.name: Review Documentation Policy
steps.description: Understand 12 core documentation files and size limits
steps.purpose: Learn approved documentation structure and no new .md file policy

steps.name: Review current-truth.json Schema
steps.description: Understand JSON-first documentation structure
steps.purpose: Learn how to update CURRENT_TRUTH.md via JSON editing

steps.name: Validate Documentation JSON
steps.description: Run validation on current-truth.json
steps.purpose: Ensure JSON follows schema before regenerating markdown

steps.name: Generate Markdown from JSON
steps.description: Regenerate CURRENT_TRUTH.md from JSON source
steps.purpose: Understand automated markdown generation workflow

steps.name: Review Evidence File Schema
steps.description: Understand evidence file structure and validation
steps.purpose: Learn how to create valid evidence files for all changes

steps.name: Validate Evidence Files
steps.description: Run validation on all evidence files
steps.purpose: Ensure all evidence follows required schema

onFailure.message: Evidence validation failed but not critical for setup

phases.name: Simple Feature Workflow
phases.description: Quick workflow for UI components and small feature enhancements

steps.name: Create Feature Branch
steps.description: Branch from main for new feature
steps.purpose: Isolate feature work in dedicated branch

steps.name: Implement Feature
steps.description: Write code following TypeScript strict mode and existing patterns
steps.purpose: Develop feature using enterprise standards

steps.name: Write Tests
steps.description: Create tests achieving 80% minimum coverage
steps.purpose: Ensure code quality and prevent regressions

steps.name: Verify Visually
steps.description: Start dev server and test component manually
steps.purpose: Validate UI/UX and visual correctness

steps.name: Run Quality Checks
steps.description: Execute TypeScript, tests, and lint checks
steps.purpose: Ensure all quality gates pass before commit

steps.name: Commit Changes
steps.description: Commit with conventional commit format
steps.command: git add . && git commit -m "feat: add MyComponent for feature X"
steps.purpose: Save changes with descriptive commit message

steps.name: Push Branch
steps.description: Push feature branch to remote
steps.purpose: Make branch available for PR creation

steps.name: Create Pull Request
steps.description: Open PR to develop branch
steps.command: gh pr create --base develop --title "feat: my feature" --body "Closes #123"
steps.purpose: Submit feature for code review and validation

phases.name: MCP-Guided Workflow for Complex Changes
phases.description: Complete 9-step workflow with MCP validation for infrastructure changes

steps.name: Query MCP for Guidance
steps.description: Get MCP guidance for implementation approach
steps.purpose: Receive AI-validated guidance before planning

steps.name: Create Work Plan
steps.description: Draft detailed implementation plan based on MCP guidance
steps.command: echo 'Manual step: Create work-plan.json based on MCP guidance'
steps.purpose: Document step-by-step implementation strategy

steps.name: Validate Work Plan with MCP
steps.description: Submit work plan for MCP validation (must score 70/100)
steps.purpose: Ensure plan meets quality standards before implementation

onFailure.message: Revise work plan based on MCP feedback and revalidate

steps.name: Check Strategy Alignment
steps.description: Verify approach aligns with platform strategy
steps.purpose: Confirm implementation strategy follows platform patterns

steps.name: Implement Changes
steps.description: Execute implementation following validated work plan
steps.command: echo 'Manual step: Implement changes per validated work plan'
steps.purpose: Develop feature with enterprise quality standards

steps.name: Create Evidence Files
steps.description: Document implementation with evidence files at each step
steps.purpose: Build audit trail for validation and review

steps.name: Run Tests
steps.description: Execute test suite with 80% minimum coverage
steps.purpose: Validate implementation correctness and prevent regressions

steps.name: Update CURRENT_TRUTH.md
steps.description: Add entry to current-truth.json and regenerate markdown
steps.purpose: Maintain single source of truth for platform state

steps.name: Commit with Evidence References
steps.description: Commit changes with references to evidence files
steps.command: git add . && git commit -m "feat: implementation\n\nEvidence: evidence/my-implementation/"
steps.purpose: Link commits to evidence for traceability

onFailure.message: Commit failed - check for uncommitted changes or pre-commit hook failures

phases.name: Versioning and Release Management
phases.description: MCP-guided version bump decisions and release process

steps.name: Gather Changes Since Last Release
steps.description: Collect git log from last tag to develop
steps.purpose: Prepare context for MCP version decision

steps.name: Query MCP for Version Bump Decision
steps.description: Ask MCP whether this should be MAJOR, MINOR, or PATCH
steps.command: curl -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/mcp/get-guidance -d '{"query":"Should this be MAJOR, MINOR, or PATCH release?","context":"$(cat changes.txt)"}'
steps.purpose: Get AI-validated version bump recommendation

steps.name: Create Release Branch
steps.description: Branch from develop with version number
steps.purpose: Isolate release preparation

steps.name: Bump Version with npm
steps.description: Use npm version command based on MCP recommendation
steps.purpose: Update package.json version semantically

steps.name: Update CHANGELOG.md
steps.description: Move unreleased entries to new version section
steps.command: echo 'Manual step: Update CHANGELOG.md with release notes'
steps.purpose: Document release changes for users

steps.name: Commit Release Preparation
steps.description: Commit version bump and changelog
steps.command: git add package.json CHANGELOG.md && git commit -m "chore: prepare release v1.1.0"
steps.purpose: Save release changes

steps.name: Push Release Branch
steps.description: Push branch to remote for PR
steps.purpose: Make release available for review

steps.name: Create Release PR
steps.description: Open PR to main with release details
steps.command: gh pr create --base main --head release/v1.1.0 --title "Release v1.1.0" --body "See CHANGELOG.md"
steps.purpose: Submit release for approval and validation

phases.name: Deployment and Rollback
phases.description: Deploy to staging/production and rollback procedures

steps.name: Pre-Deploy Validation
steps.description: Run complete validation suite before deployment
steps.purpose: Ensure deployment readiness

steps.name: Update CURRENT_TRUTH.md for Deployment
steps.description: Document deployment in current-truth.json
steps.command: echo 'Manual step: Edit current-truth.json and regenerate markdown'
steps.purpose: Record deployment event in platform state

steps.name: Deploy to Staging
steps.description: Trigger staging deployment workflow
steps.purpose: Deploy to staging environment for validation

steps.name: Monitor Deployment
steps.description: Watch deployment workflow execution
steps.purpose: Track deployment progress and catch failures

steps.name: Run Post-Deployment Health Checks
steps.description: Verify all services healthy after deployment
steps.purpose: Validate deployment success

steps.name: Create Deployment Evidence
steps.description: Document successful deployment with evidence file
steps.purpose: Build audit trail for deployment

smokeTests.expectedBehavior: Returns JSON array of available MCP tools
TypeScript compilation passes with no errors

performanceThresholds.measurement: Time to receive guidance or validation response
Total time for all pre-commit validations

dataIntegrity.expected: All evidence files pass schema validation
All dependencies compatible with used features

rollback.decisionMaker: AI Agent with human approval for production

steps.name: SSH to Deployment Server
steps.purpose: Access deployment server for rollback

steps.name: Navigate to Ectropy Directory
steps.purpose: Change to application directory

steps.name: Checkout Previous Commit
steps.purpose: Revert to last known good version

steps.name: Rebuild Docker Containers
steps.purpose: Rebuild containers with previous code

steps.name: Restart Services
steps.purpose: Deploy rolled-back version

steps.name: Verify Rollback Health
steps.purpose: Confirm services healthy after rollback

verification.successCriteria: All services return HTTP 200 from health endpoints

alertThresholds.escalation: Notify developer to fix before merge
Developer must fix issues or use --no-verify with justification

successCriteria.criterion: MCP server connectivity established and API key validated

successCriteria.validation: Agent confirms understanding of system structure and workflow

successCriteria.criterion: Graph Query Layer tested and functional
successCriteria.validation: GraphQL and REST endpoints return valid decision/evidence data
Agent can run local TypeScript checks, tests, and lint successfully
Updates to current-truth.json pass validation and generate markdown
Feature branch created, tests pass, PR opened to develop

successCriteria.criterion: MCP-guided workflow completed for complex change
successCriteria.validation: Work plan validated >= 70/100, evidence files created, CURRENT_TRUTH.md updated

successCriteria.criterion: Deployment executed with health check validation
successCriteria.validation: Staging deployment successful with all services healthy

supportedQueries.query: How do I set up MCP server connection?
supportedQueries.returns: Phase 1: Initial Setup and Environment Understanding
supportedQueries.purpose: Guide agents through MCP connectivity setup

supportedQueries.query: What are the Graph Query endpoints for decision intelligence?
supportedQueries.returns: Phase 2: MCP Graph Query Layer Integration with REST and GraphQL examples
supportedQueries.purpose: Enable efficient platform intelligence queries with 97% token reduction

supportedQueries.query: What quality gates must I pass before merging?
supportedQueries.returns: Phase 3: Quality Gates and Validation Framework (4 layers)
supportedQueries.purpose: Understand pre-commit, pre-merge, proactive, and dependency validation

supportedQueries.returns: Phase 4: Documentation Standards - Edit current-truth.json, validate, and regenerate

supportedQueries.query: What's the workflow for simple UI features?
supportedQueries.purpose: Quick workflow for components and small enhancements

supportedQueries.query: What's the MCP-guided workflow for complex changes?
supportedQueries.purpose: Complete validation workflow for infrastructure/architecture changes

supportedQueries.query: How do I decide MAJOR vs MINOR vs PATCH version?
supportedQueries.returns: Phase 7: Versioning and Release Management with MCP decision support

supportedQueries.query: What's the deployment and rollback procedure?
supportedQueries.returns: Phase 8: Deployment and Rollback with health check validation

decisionSupport: Use Simple Feature Workflow (Phase 5) for UI components, styling, small enhancements
Use MCP-Guided Workflow (Phase 6) for infrastructure, database, API, security, or cross-service changes
Always query MCP for guidance before creating work plans (mandatory for complex changes)
Work plan must score >= 70/100 in MCP validation before implementation
Update current-truth.json (not CURRENT_TRUTH.md directly) following JSON-first workflow
Create evidence files for all changes following evidence-schema.json
Query MCP for version bump decision (MAJOR/MINOR/PATCH) before creating release
Run all quality gates locally before pushing (TypeScript, tests, lint, dependencies)
Use Graph Query endpoints to minimize token usage (97% reduction vs full markdown files)

architectureAlignment.routingConfig: MCP endpoints align with routing-architecture.json service definitions
architectureAlignment.portAllocation: MCP Server: 3001 (native), 3002 (express API), API Gateway: 4000, Web: 3000
architectureAlignment.oauthConfig: MCP API uses X-API-Key header or apiKey query parameter for authentication

knownIssues.title: MCP Server Unreachable from GitHub Actions
knownIssues.impact: MCP validation gates cannot run in CI/CD pipeline
knownIssues.mitigation: Use local MCP server or staging environment with proper firewall rules
knownIssues.action: Verify MCP_URL and MCP_API_KEY are set in GitHub Actions secrets

knownIssues.title: GraphQL Queries Timeout on Large Decision Sets
knownIssues.impact: Queries with deep nesting may exceed timeout
knownIssues.mitigation: Use field selection to query only needed data, avoid deep relationship traversal
knownIssues.action: Break large queries into multiple smaller queries

knownIssues.title: CURRENT_TRUTH.md Manual Edits Lost on Regeneration
knownIssues.impact: Direct markdown edits overwritten by docs:generate script
knownIssues.mitigation: Never edit CURRENT_TRUTH.md directly, always edit current-truth.json
knownIssues.action: Use docs:validate before docs:generate to catch schema errors

knownIssues.title: Test Coverage Below 80% Blocks Merge
knownIssues.impact: PR validation fails if coverage drops below threshold
knownIssues.mitigation: Write tests achieving 80% minimum coverage before creating PR
knownIssues.action: Run pnpm nx test --coverage locally before pushing

required.name: MCP_API_KEY
required.description: API key for MCP server authentication

required.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
required.description: GitHub personal access token for API access
